steps.title: Spot the central link
steps.content: Literary character affects spiritual well-being. This relationship is what needs illustration.

steps.title: Apply the signal
steps.content:
Choice A directly illustrates this: poetry's character—what it fortifies or demolishes, gives or robs—determines its spiritual effects, making it more necessary than industry itself.
The other three don't show how literary character determines spiritual well-being.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
